§6Rubber§f

§aSynthetic polymer with elastic properties — essential for automation, reactors, and hazmat suits!§f

Rubber is a synthetic polymer produced from §bUnsaturated Hydrocarbons§f and §bSulfur§f in the §bChemical Plant§f. It is a gating material for most post-cracked-oil machines, including the §bZIRNOX Nuclear Reactor§f — most players' first reactor.

§6Production§f:
§b• Chemical Plant§f: §e500mB§f Unsaturated Hydrocarbons + Sulfur → §e1×§f Rubber Bar (requires §bRubber§f template).
§b• Ore Acidizer§f (alternate): Sour Gas + Latex Bar → Rubber Bar, or Cadmium Powder + Fish Oil → Rubber Bar.

§6Uses§f:
§b• Conveyor Belts§f: §e64×§f per batch (replaces Latex in all conveyor recipes).
§b• Pneumatic Tubes§f: §e8-24×§f per batch for item transport automation.
§b• ZIRNOX Reactor§f: §e16×§f Rubber Bars required for the reactor assembly.
§b• Armor§f: Component in improved armor and hazmat suits.

§eTip§f: Rubber is far easier to automate than Latex and replaces it in all recipes. Set up automated Unsaturated Hydrocarbon production from your cracked oil line, then pipe it into a Chemical Plant with sulfur for continuous rubber output. You will need thousands for conveyor-based automation!
